_comment: multi_agent_generic_pg swarm config — ten generic specialists (gena..genj) all on claude-opus-4-7. Specialist names are 4 letters (gen<x>) so that job-name domain truncation `domain[:4]` produces unique strings — required because agent_core.harness.config:make_job_name truncates the domain segment to its first 4 lowercase letters. Operator may override via supervisor CLI flags or env vars.
